title: Example Config (template worked example)
description: Template example schema shipped by franklesniak/copilot-repo-template to demonstrate JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 conventions and pre-commit validation of valid examples. This is NOT a production contract for any downstream repository. Downstream consumers SHOULD replace or remove this schema, its example data files under schemas/examples/example-config/, and the associated check-jsonschema hook(s) when adopting the template. See schemas/README.md for the canonical removal checklist.

name.description: Human-readable identifier for the example configuration. Required and must be a non-empty string.

enabled.description: Whether this example configuration is active. Required.

description.description: Optional free-form description of what this configuration represents.

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional non-negative integer timeout, expressed in whole seconds.

tags.description: Optional list of short string tags. Each tag must be a non-empty string and the list must not contain duplicates.

createdAt.description: Optional RFC 3339-compatible date-time string indicating when this configuration was created.
